title: TeraWulf Reports First Quarter 2024 Financial Results
text: TeraWulf revenue increased to $42.4 million in Q1 2024 compared to $23.3 million in Q4 2023, an 82.2% increase. Gross profit reached $28.0 million, up 95.3% quarter-over-quarter. Adjusted EBITDA increased 95.4% to $32.0 million in Q1 2024 compared to $16.4 million in Q4 2023. TeraWulf self-mined 1,057 bitcoin across the Lake Mariner and Nautilus Cryptomine facilities, with a total value of bitcoin self-mined of $56.8 million in Q1 2024 compared to $35.2 million in Q4 2023. The company is expanding mining operations at its wholly owned Lake Mariner Facility in New York with the addition of Building 4, which is expected to increase the facility's bitcoin mining infrastructure capacity from 160 MW to 195 MW by mid 2024. Construction activities were initiated for Building 5 at the Lake Mariner Facility, expected to add an incremental 50 MW of bitcoin mining capacity, bringing TeraWulf's total operational capacity to approximately 300 MW by the first quarter of 2025.
